_comment: Business / legal placeholders rendered into templates/legal/*.html via the {{ biz }} context. Values starting with 'TBD:' are highlighted by the |pl Jinja filter so unfilled spots are visually obvious before launch.

address_full: TBD: full street address, city, state, PIN, India
